argument_decision_audit: argument-decision audit (Kim et al. 2026 / ArgScope B1-B2 structural-arc + discourse-mode anchor)
assertoric: deterministic argument-move profile (ArgScope B3/B4 + AGD; population baseline + two-corpus separation test, no verdict)
authorship_embedding: style-embedding voice fingerprint (LUAR / Wegmann learned style manifold; cosine-similarity distribution, no verdict)
edit_magnitude: edit-magnitude estimate relative to the corpus the model was calibrated on (uncalibrated by default; NOT an absolute % AI)
embedding_explanation: embedding explanation: a named side-by-side of the authorship_embedding LUAR cosine vs interpretable stylometric features (tracks/diverges) — an interpretation aid for human review, no same-author / AI-vs-human verdict and no fabricated explained/residual number
intrinsic_dimension: intrinsic (PHD) dimension of the text's contextual-embedding cloud under a named model (discrimination evidence, uncalibrated, non-verdict)
narrative_decision_audit: narrative-decision audit (Russell et al. 2026 / StoryScope 30-core-feature anchor)
narratorial_distance: narratorial-distance / free-indirect-discourse profile (voice-coherence family; descriptive, non-verdict)
productive_roughness: productive-roughness deviation vs the writer's own baseline (descriptive, strictly baseline-relative, non-verdict)
rewriting_invariance: rewriting-invariance distance under a named judge model + prompt (discrimination evidence, uncalibrated, non-verdict)
sound_texture: sound-texture profile (alliteration / assonance / consonance adjacency density + consonant-class profile) via an orthographic-onset proxy (descriptive, non-verdict)
